segments.text: Attention small business owners and marketers. [music] Google just dropped a major new AI tool that's about to revolutionize how you create content.
Introducing Pomei from Google Labs and Deep [music] Mind. This new AI experiment is specifically designed to help small and medium-sized businesses
effortlessly generate scalable professional and most importantly onbrand social media campaigns. The core genius of Pomelli is the business DNA.
You [music] simply enter your website and the AI instantly analyzes it to understand your unique tone of voice,
[music] colors, and visual style. It then generates tailored campaign ideas and a complete set of marketing assets from visuals to captions [music] all
perfectly matched to your brand. This tool eliminates the time, cost, and design skills usually required for quality [music] marketing. Ready to level up your social media game? Search
for Google PL and start generating professional campaigns in minutes.
[music] This changes everything in the world of AI automation. What are your thoughts on the update?
